data.title: BNB Chain’s paid messaging platform, ReachMe, permanently shut down
data.description:
A paid texting app called ReachMe, which was part of the BNB Chain, has announced its closure on its website. In addition, all user data has been managed securely as per the privacy policy. Changpeng Zhao (CZ), CEO of Binance, was one of many notable crypto industry individuals whom users could privately chat on ReachMe. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bnb-chains-paid-messaging-platform-reachme-permanently-shut-down/

data.title: U.S. President Trump Pardons Binance Founder and Former CEO, CZ
data.description: According to an exclusive from the Wall Street Journal, U.S. President Trump has pardoned Binance founder and former CEO, Changpeng Zhao (CZ).

data.title: Crypto Industry Mergers Surpass $10 Billion in Third Quarter
data.description: According to PANews, the third quarter of 2025 saw a significant milestone in the cryptocurrency industry, with mergers and acquisitions exceeding $10 billion for the first time. This marks a more than 30-fold increase compared to the same period last year, as reported by Architect Partners. A notable transaction was FalconX's acquisition of 21shares, highlighting a broader trend of cryptocurrency experts entering traditional investment channels through regulated products. U.S. President Donald Trump's policies have spurred a wave of mergers and acquisitions, altering strategic considerations for companies like 21shares. As regulatory barriers ease, major Wall Street firms are increasingly engaging with the cryptocurrency sector, prompting existing companies to build competitive defenses.

data.title: JPMorgan predicts that the average gold price will exceed $5,000 in 2026 and is expected to reach $6,000 in the long term.
data.description: JPMorgan analysts maintained their bullish stance on gold on Thursday, predicting that the price will average $5,055 per ounce by the fourth quarter of 2026. The bank's research note stated that this forecast assumes that quarterly investor demand and central bank gold purchases will average 566 tons in 2026. Natasha Kaneva, JPMorgan's head of global commodities strategy, stated, "Gold remains our highest-conviction long position this year, and as the market enters a Fed rate-cutting cycle, gold prices have room to rise." Gregory Shearer, head of base and precious metals strategy, added, "The Fed's rate-cutting cycle, coupled with concerns about stagflation, concerns about Fed independence, and the risk of currency devaluation, all create a favorable backdrop for gold." Analysts believe the recent market consolidation is healthy. Kaneva said, "The pullback reflects the market digesting the rapid gains since August. ... It's normal to feel nervous in the face of such a rapid rise. This is essentially a supply-demand imbalance—buyers are plentiful and sellers are scarce." She reiterated her long-term target of $6,000 per ounce by 2028, emphasizing that gold's trajectory should be viewed from a multi-year perspective. (Gold Ten)

data.title: BNB Chain and YZI Labs jointly launch the BNB Hack: Local Series hackathon and registration is now open
data.description: Registration is now open for the BNB Hack: Local Series hackathon, jointly launched by BNB Chain and YZI Labs. Winners will have the opportunity to receive support from the $1 billion Builder Fund. Winning teams will receive prizes and receive: direct interview opportunities for the MVB program; EASY Residency incubation status; up to $50,000 in ecosystem launch support; and exposure on the BNB Chain network.

data.title: Haotian International, a Hong Kong-listed company, bought a total of 646 ETH, equivalent to approximately $271.
data.description: Haotian International, a Hong Kong-listed company, announced that it has purchased a total of 646 ETH through the open market, with a transaction amount of approximately US$2.71 million (excluding transaction costs).

data.title: Federal Reserve Expected to Halt Balance Sheet Reduction This Month
data.description:
According to PANews, strategists from JPMorgan Chase and Bank of America anticipate that the Federal Reserve will cease its reduction of the approximately $6.6 trillion balance sheet this month. This process, aimed at withdrawing liquidity from financial markets, is expected to conclude earlier than initially planned. The banks have revised their forecasts due to the recent rise in borrowing costs in the U.S. dollar funding market. Previously, they had projected that the balance sheet reduction, which began in June 2022, would continue until December or early next year.

The market widely expects Federal Reserve officials to decide on the future of the balance sheet during next week's interest rate decision. While a 25 basis point rate cut is considered highly likely, there is still disagreement on Wall Street regarding the timing of the end of quantitative tightening. Institutions such as TD Securities and Mizuho Securities have moved their predictions forward to October, whereas analysts from Barclays and Goldman Sachs believe the conclusion will occur later.

data.title: ETHZilla Acquires Stake in SEC-Regulated Broker Liquidity.io
data.description: According to Foresight News, ETHZilla, a company specializing in Ethereum-based crypto treasury management, has announced the acquisition of a 15% stake in Satschel, the parent company of Liquidity.io, for $15 million. Liquidity.io operates as a broker-dealer and digital alternative trading system (ATS) under the regulation of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This strategic acquisition aims to integrate Liquidity.io's regulated securitization platform and token marketplace with ETHZilla's blockchain-native asset management platform. The collaboration is expected to transform future tokenized real-world assets (RWA) issued by ETHZilla into compliant, tradable instruments with liquidity in both primary and secondary markets.

data.title: Market News: MANTRA plans to rename OM to MANTRA and implement a 1:4 token split
data.description: According to market news, the RWA sector project MANTRA plans to change the token name from OM to MANTRA and implement a 1:4 token split.

data.title: Aave Labs acquires Stable Finance to expand consumer access to on-chain savings
data.description: Aave Labs, the company behind the DeFi project Aave, said it has acquired Stable Finance, a San Francisco-based startup dedicated to simplifying on-chain savings operations for everyday users. Terms of the transaction were not disclosed. The move brings Stable founder Mario Baxter Cabrera and his engineering team to Aave Labs, where they will help develop new DeFi products for consumers. Cabrera will join as product director. Aave Labs founder Stani Kulechov said the acquisition reinforces the company's goal of integrating "on-chain finance into everyday finance." Stable's technology will be integrated into future Aave Labs products, and its existing applications will be gradually phased out. This acquisition is Aave's third talent-focused deal, following the acquisitions of Sonar in 2022 and Family in 2023, as it continues to expand its product design capabilities. (CoinDesk)

data.title: "100% Winning Rate Whale" BTC Long Position Exceeds $80 Million
data.description: According to Ai Yi, an on-chain analyst, following BTC's short-term decline, the "100% Win Rate Whale from October 11th to Date" has surpassed $80 million in BTC long positions with a 19x position. The current position is 800.46 BTC, valued at $87.23 million, with an opening price of $109,230. The order range is [$108,700-$108,800], with a total of 380.98 BTC, valued at $41.43 million.

data.title: ETHZilla, a US-listed Ethereum treasury company, acquires 15% of Satschel for $15 million
data.description: According to Cryptobriefing, Peter Thiel-backed ETHZilla will acquire a 15% stake in Satschel for $15 million. ETHZilla, a publicly traded company transitioning from biotech to Ethereum accumulation and staking strategies, currently trades under the ticker symbol ETHZ. This follows news that Web3 compliance firm Satschel secured $5.2 million in seed funding led by Brand Foundry Ventures.

data.title: BNB Surges Past $1122 Amid Daily Gains
data.description: According to PANews, BNB has experienced a significant increase, surpassing the $1122 mark. As of the latest report, BNB is valued at $1122.10 per coin, reflecting a daily rise of 3.81%. This upward trend highlights the cryptocurrency's strong performance in the market.

data.title: Paxos Launches Payroll in USDG Stablecoin
data.description: According to Blockworks, Paxos has partnered with Toku to launch a feature through payroll platforms ADP and Workday that allows employees to receive a portion of their pay in the stablecoin USDG. Unlike traditional paychecks, settlement will be instant.

data.title: Programmable bank Pave Bank completes $39 million Series A financing led by Accel
data.description: Pave Bank has completed a US$39 million Series A financing round. This round of financing was led by Accel, with participation from Wintermute, Tether Investments, Quona Capital, Helios Digital Ventures and other institutions. Pave Bank calls itself "the world's first programmable bank built for the digital asset and AI era" and holds a Georgia banking license. The bank is designed for customers who need both fiat currency and digital asset services, enabling real-time management of fiat currency and digital assets, automating fund management operations and reducing dependence on intermediaries. Co-founder and CEO Salim Dhanani said that the global financial system is shifting towards regulated on-chain finance, and institutions need a trusted bridge connecting traditional finance and emerging finance. Pave Bank will use this round of funds to expand regulatory coverage, accelerate product development, build institutional-grade infrastructure and expand global market customer coverage. (The Block)

data.title: Bitget Launchpool project APR is now open for investment. Locking BGB or APR will unlock 1.33 million APR.
data.description: Bitget's current Launchpool project, aPriori (APR), is now open for staking. Staking in BGB and APR will unlock 1,333,333 APR. Staking will close at 22:00 (UTC+8) on October 25th. This round of Launchpool features two staking pools: BGB staking pool: Total airdrop: 1,222,222 APR; VIP user staking limit: 50,000 BGB; Standard user staking limit: 5,000 BGB; APR staking pool: Total airdrop: 111,111 APR; Individual staking limit: 1,000,000 APR.
